admin.title: Admin dashboard
admin.heading: Keep the learning system healthy
admin.body: Monitor published content, drafts, and operational readiness from one focused workspace.
admin.content_body: Admins can manage every course, including published courses.
admin.empty_content: No courses have been created yet.
admin.guardrail_body: Use this area for platform-wide oversight. Deeper users, cohorts, revenue and analytics controls will land as their backend modules are exposed.
admin.portfolio_body: Courses, paths and cohorts at a glance.

admin_earnings.title: Earnings
admin_earnings.heading: Platform earnings
admin_earnings.subtitle: What the platform has taken across every settled order. Each order counts on the terms it was sold under, so changing a setting never rewrites history.
admin_earnings.take_help: The fee plus the platform's cut of revenue.
admin_earnings.fee_help: Non-refundable, taken off the top of every sale.
admin_earnings.escrowed_help: Owed back to learners who finish in time — not platform revenue.
admin_earnings.refunded_help: Already returned to learners who earned it back.
admin_earnings.empty_body: Once paid content sells, the breakdown by course, path and cohort appears here.

admin_payouts.title: Payouts
admin_payouts.subtitle: Instructor payouts and learner Earn-Back refunds. Run a bulk payout once accounts are verified.
admin_payouts.no_activity_hint: Instructors are paid from guaranteed revenue and forfeited Earn-Back. A learner who finishes on time forfeits nothing, so that sale pays out nothing here — check Earn-Back refunds below.
admin_payouts.refunds_subtitle: Refunds to learners who completed in time. Sent to their original payment method automatically.

admin_settings.methods_help: Which methods learners can pay with. Switching one off takes it out of checkout immediately — keep at least one on.
admin_settings.methods_last: Your only payment method — switch another on first.

methods_provider.paystack: Cards, bank transfer and USSD. The default for NGN, GHS, ZAR and KES.
methods_provider.stripe: Cards and wallets. The default for every other currency.

instructors.queue_hint: They can't create or publish anything until you approve them.
instructors.queue_empty: No one is waiting. New instructor applications land here.

admin_users.title: Users
admin_users.subtitle: Everyone on the platform. Change what someone can do, or suspend access.
admin_users.suspend_desc: They'll be signed out and refused on every request until you restore them. Their content, enrolments and any money owed are untouched.
admin_users.reason_ph: e.g. Repeated spam in cohort chat
admin_users.no_self_role: You can't change your own role.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.subtitle_instructor: How learners are doing across your courses.
analytics.subtitle_admin: Learning performance across the whole platform.
analytics.table_empty: Nothing yet — analytics appear once learners enrol.
analytics.no_lessons: This course has no lessons yet.

assessment.settings_subtitle: Pass mark, timing, retakes and the integrity rules learners take this under.
assessment.title: Title
assessment.ac_camera_hint: Face check every 30s — runs in the browser.
assessment.questions_hint: Add questions by hand, or draft them from a lesson with AI.
assessment.no_questions: No questions yet. Add one or generate from a lesson.
assessment.delete_desc: This removes the assessment and all its questions.
assessment.code_grading_ai_hint: Graded automatically against your reference solution when the learner submits.
assessment.code_grading_manual_hint: You review each submission and grade it yourself. The attempt is held until you do.
assessment.code_notes_ph: Optional notes to guide your own grading later.
assessment.code_reference_ph: Describe what correct code must do, or paste a model solution. The AI grades the learner's code against this.
assessment.ai_blurb: AI drafts questions from the transcripts of every lesson you pick — choose a whole module or course to spread questions across it. Review and edit them before learners take the assessment.
assessment.ai_no_lessons: No source lessons found for this assessment. Add questions by hand instead.
assessment.ai_need_transcript: None of these lessons have a transcript yet — add one to generate from it.
assessment.final_subtitle: Learners must pass this to complete the course and trigger Earn-Back.
assessment.retry_policy_hint: What happens when a learner doesn't pass: how many tries they get, how long they wait between tries, and whether their tries reset after a break.
assessment.settings_subtitle_formative: Pass mark, timing and the integrity rules learners take this under. This is practice — retakes are unlimited; only finals limit attempts.

blog.title: Blog
blog.heading: Blog
blog.subtitle: Write articles that appear on the public blog — learning science, product news and more.
blog.empty: No posts yet — write your first article.
blog.author: Author
blog.excerpt_ph: One or two sentences shown on cards.

charts.enrolments_subtitle: New enrolments into your content per day (UTC).
charts.earnings_subtitle: Booked when the money became yours: guaranteed cut at payment, forfeited Earn-Back at resolution (UTC months).
charts.funnel_subtitle: Of everyone enrolled, who started — and who finished.
charts.funnel_empty: No enrolments yet — the funnel starts with one.
charts.revenue_subtitle: Settled orders by month paid (UTC). Stack height is gross; Earn-Back escrow is learners' money and is not shown.
charts.ac_subtitle: Submitted attempts and what anti-cheat saw.
charts.ac_clean: No anti-cheat events in this window. Quiet is good.
charts.outcomes_subtitle: Everyone enrolled in your content, by where they are.
charts.earnback_subtitle: Resolved Earn-Back sales. On time means the learner won — that's the deal working.
charts.revenue_by_type_subtitle: Gross settled revenue, by what was sold.
charts.growth_subtitle: Total registered learners over time (UTC months).
charts.top_content_empty: Publish something and it will race to the top.
charts.heatmap_subtitle: Learning activity by day and hour (UTC).
charts.heatmap_empty: No learning activity in this window yet.

cohorts.title: Cohorts
cohorts.heading: Cohorts
cohorts.subtitle: Schedule a guided run of courses with a start date, seats, groups and assigned staff.
cohorts.empty: No cohorts yet — schedule your first run.
cohorts.no_courses: No courses yet — add one below.
cohorts.paths_hint: Attach whole paths in addition to standalone courses.
cohorts.no_paths: No paths yet — add one below.

courses.title: My courses
courses.subtitle: Create, publish, and maintain lessons built for focused learning.
courses.heading: Build courses learners can finish
courses.admin_heading: Manage every course on the platform
courses.admin_subtitle: Review, open, publish, and remove courses across instructors without leaving the admin studio.
courses.admin_empty: No platform courses have been created yet.
courses.empty: You haven't created any courses yet.
courses.delete_description: This will permanently delete "{{title}}", including its modules and lessons. Published courses can be deleted too.

earnback_deadline.title: Set your Earn-Back deadline
earnback_deadline.body: Finish by the date you pick and your Earn-Back comes back to your card. You choose — anything up to {{max}} days.
earnback_deadline.body_amount: Finish by the date you pick and we send {{amount}} back to your card. You choose — anything up to {{max}} days.
earnback_deadline.legend: Choose how many days you need
earnback_deadline.final_note: This is final — you can't change it later. Finish late and 2% of your Earn-Back is deducted for each day.

earnback_status.deadline_yours: Your deadline: {{date}} — set by you, and final.
earnback_status.refunded_body: {{amount}} is being refunded to your original payment method.
earnback_status.refunded_eta: Refunds usually land within 5–10 business days, depending on your bank. Nothing else to do.
earnback_status.sending_body: You earned {{amount}} back. We're sending it to your original payment method now — this page updates on its own.
earnback_status.failed_body: Your {{amount}} isn't lost — our team is on it and will be in touch. There's nothing you need to do.
earnback_status.none_body: No Earn-Back remaining on this one.
earnback_status.escrow_body_nodate: Complete everything to get your Earn-Back refunded.
earnback_status.escrow_overdue: Past your deadline — finish soon; a small daily amount is deducted now.
earnback_status.escrow_body: Finish within {{count}} days to get the full refund to your payment method.

earnings.empty_body: This is the cash we've transferred to you. Sales that earn you nothing — because the learner finished on time — show in your Earn-Back ledger below.
earnings.title: Earnings
earnings.subtitle: Your payouts from paid enrolments. You keep 90% of every sale that settles as revenue.
earnings.no_accounts: Add the bank account where you'd like to receive your earnings. Until one is verified, payouts wait safely as pending.

editor.no_modules: Add your first module to start building.
editor.builder_body: Structure the course into short modules and make sure every lesson has content plus a transcript.
editor.reason_video_not_encoded: Upload the video and let it finish encoding.

feature_requests.title: Feature requests
feature_requests.body: Instructors asking to appear in the homepage carousel.

grade.title: Grade submission
grade.code_queue_hint: These learners submitted code you chose to grade manually. Their result is held until you grade it.
grade.load_failed_body: Refresh the page or go back and try again.
grade.queue_load_failed_body: Refresh the page or go back and try again.
grade.not_yours: Only this project's creator can grade it.

grouping.title: Groups
grouping.mode_balanced_hint: Auto-grouping balances level and join date.
grouping.mode_manual_hint: Drag learners into groups, or use the Move button.
grouping.regen_desc: This rebuilds every group from the cohort's grouping mode. Learners whose group changes are notified.
grouping.drop_here: Drop learners here, or use Move
grouping.no_other_groups: No other groups yet — create one first.
grouping.delete_group_desc: Its members return to the unassigned pool.
grouping.banner_no_learners: No learners have enrolled in this cohort yet.
grouping.banner_assign: Select learners below to form a group, or drag one into a group. On mobile, tap Move.
grouping.banner_done: Every learner is in a group. Use Move to reshuffle anyone.

hub.title: Course
hub.locked_lessons: Finish all {{total}} lessons to unlock this. {{done}} done so far.
hub.locked_quizzes: Pass every module quiz to unlock this.
hub.locked_courses_one: Finish {{count}} more course to unlock this.
hub.locked_courses_other: Finish {{count}} more courses to unlock this.
hub.locked_paths_one: Finish {{count}} more path to unlock this.
hub.locked_paths_other: Finish {{count}} more paths to unlock this.
hub.locked_path_courses_one: Finish {{count}} more course in this path to unlock this.
hub.locked_path_courses_other: Finish {{count}} more courses in this path to unlock this.

instructor.title: Instructor studio
instructor.body: Track your courses and paths, and jump back into building.
instructor.empty: Create your first course to get started.

intro.title: Intro / preview
intro.subtitle: An optional video, audio, PDF or text shown to learners before they enrol — your own preview for this.
intro.needs_media: Add media in the editor to finish

ledger.title: Earn-Back ledger
ledger.subtitle: Every sale of your content and what became of it. Your payouts above show only the cash that moved.
ledger.empty_body: When someone buys your paid content, the sale appears here — including sales that earn you nothing because the learner finished on time.
ledger.on_time_headline: {{count}} of {{total}} learners finished on time. They earned their money back — that's your Earn-Back working.
ledger.why_at_stake: You earn {{amount}} more only if they miss {{date}}.
ledger.why_at_stake_nodate: You earn {{amount}} more only if they don't finish.
ledger.why_on_time: They finished in time and earned their money back — the {{pct}}% you set.
ledger.why_late: Finished {{count}} days late, so that slice of the Earn-Back came to you.
ledger.why_missed: They never finished, so the full Earn-Back came to you.
ledger.why_settled: No Earn-Back on this one — paid to you at checkout.

lesson.title: Edit lesson
lesson.load_failed_body: Refresh the page or go back to the course and try again.
lesson.audio_encoding_body: We are normalizing loudness and preparing the protected audio file.
lesson.encoding_failed_body: Encoding failed. Replace the file and try again.
lesson.transcript_placeholder: Paste or type the full transcript…
lesson.drop_or_browse: Drag a file here, or browse
lesson.quiz_hint: Control how this lesson is marked complete.
lesson.pre_quiz_hint: Optional recall check before the lesson.
lesson.post_quiz_hint: Must be passed to complete the lesson.
lesson.transcript_required_warn: Add a transcript — the course can't be published until every lesson has one (§4.2).
lesson.free_preview_hint: Anyone can watch/read this lesson before enrolling.
lesson.timed_hint: Paste or upload a .vtt / .srt file to highlight the transcript as the lesson plays. This doesn't change captions.
lesson.timed_parse_error: No timed segments found. Paste a valid .vtt or .srt transcript.
lesson.code_editor_only_hint: Only JavaScript runs in the browser today; other languages are editor-only.
lesson.code_instructions_ph: Describe the task the learner should complete…

paths.title: Learning Paths
paths.heading: Learning Paths
paths.subtitle: Bundle your courses into an ordered journey with its own price and Earn-Back.
paths.delete_description: “{{title}}” will be removed. Its courses are not deleted.
paths.empty: No paths yet — create your first journey.
paths.settings_subtitle: Thumbnail, outcome, pricing and Earn-Back learners see on the catalogue.
paths.outcome_ph: By the end, learners will be able to…
paths.earnback_hint: The % governs the whole path purchase, overriding the courses inside it.
paths.courses_subtitle: Order matters — learners progress top to bottom.
paths.draft_courses_note: Some courses are still drafts — publish them so learners can start.
paths.or_create_course: Don't see it? Create a new draft course:
paths.or_create_path: Don't see it? Create a new draft path:
paths.load_failed_body: Refresh the page or go back and try again.

peer.intro: Review your peers' work fairly. You must finish {{n}} to complete this project.
peer.none: No peer submissions to review yet — check back soon.

play.read_to_complete: Read to the end to complete this lesson.
play.prequiz_body: A quick recall quiz before you start.
play.postquiz_required: Pass the post-lesson quiz to finish
play.course_done_hint: You've reached the end of the course.
play.quiz_locked: Finish the lesson content first to unlock this quiz.

profile.title: Your profile
profile.subtitle: Your public presence on every course, path and cohort you create.
profile.name: Name
profile.photo_hint: Tap your photo to change or remove it. PNG, JPG or WebP, up to 5 MB.
profile.expertise_ph: Type a skill and press Enter, or pick below…
profile.notifications_hint: How we reach you about payouts, submissions to grade, and Earn-Back.
profile.whatsapp_optin_hint: Payout and earnings alerts on WhatsApp — never spam.
profile.whatsapp_needs_phone: Add a phone number above to enable WhatsApp alerts.

project.delete_desc: This removes the project and all its submissions.
project.title: Title
project.description_ph: What should learners build and hand in?
project.code_language_hint: The language learners write in. Only JavaScript runs in the in-browser self-check; the rest are editor-only.
project.no_rubric: No rubric yet — add criteria to grade against (optional).
project.section_subtitle: Deliverables learners submit and you grade.
project.retry_policy_hint: What happens when a submission doesn't pass: how many attempts the learner gets, how long they wait after a failed grade, and whether their attempts reset after a break.

report.title: Integrity report
report.no_attempts: No one has taken this assessment yet.
report.admin_clean: No flagged attempts across the platform.
report.unmonitored_note: Camera monitoring failed to start, so this attempt was never watched. That is not evidence of wrongdoing — and not evidence of a clean attempt either. Judge it on its own merits.

retry.locked_body: Your attempts reset on {{date}} — review the material and come back stronger.
retry.none_left_body: You've used every attempt for this one. Reach out to your instructor if you think this is a mistake.

settings.name: Name
settings.name_hint: The title learners see on the catalogue.
settings.name_too_short: The name must be at least 3 characters.
settings.title: Course settings
settings.subtitle: Thumbnail, description, pricing and Earn-Back learners see on the catalogue.
settings.description_ph: What will learners be able to do after this course?
settings.earnback_hint: Let learners earn part of the price back by finishing in time.
settings.earnback_preview: Learners can earn back up to {{amount}} — {{pct}}% of {{remainder}} (the price minus the {{fee}}% platform fee).
settings.estimated_duration_hint: A human estimate learners see, e.g. weeks. Content length is calculated automatically from the lessons.
settings.content_length_hint_path: Auto-calculated from the courses in this path.
settings.featured_hint: Show this in the Featured carousel on the homepage.
settings.request_featuring_hint: Ask an admin to feature this on the homepage.
settings.feature_requested_note: The instructor requested featuring — approve above.
settings.earnback_days_hint: Days from payment. You set this for a cohort — learners can't.
settings.earnback_creator_all: You earn {{zero}} when a learner finishes on time — at 100%, you're paid only from learners who miss their deadline. Lower the percentage to bank a guaranteed share of every sale.
settings.earnback_creator: You keep {{amount}} of every sale at settlement — {{share}}% of the {{guaranteed}} that isn't refundable.

studio.instructors_only_body: This studio is for approved instructors and admins.
studio.admin_only_body: This area is for platform admins.

submit.code_hint: Run is a self-check — your grade comes from a reviewer, not the run.
submit.peer_cta: Complete {{n}} peer review(s) to finish this project.
submit.locked_body: Finish all the lessons and module quizzes in this course before submitting your project.
submit.offline: You seem to be offline. Your draft is saved on this device — try again once you're connected.

take.reason_no_questions: This assessment has no questions yet.
take.integrity_notice: This is a monitored assessment. The timer runs on the server and your answers are graded automatically.
take.code_hint: Run is a self-check — your grade is decided after you submit.
take.tab_autosubmit: Too many tab switches — submitting your attempt.
take.camera_denied: Camera access is required to start this assessment.
take.reason_locked_out: You've used all your retakes for now.
take.reason_prerequisites: Finish all the lessons and module quizzes first.
take.reason_awaiting_grading: Your last attempt is waiting to be graded by an instructor.
take.awaiting_body: You've submitted this assessment. An instructor will grade your code — your result appears here once they're done.
take.camera_unavailable_hint: Your attempt is recorded as unmonitored.
take.offline_banner: You're offline — keep going. Your answers are saved on this device and will sync when you're back. The timer keeps running.
take.offline_submit: You seem to be offline. Your answers are safe on this device — we'll submit as soon as you're back.

teaching.title: Cohorts you teach
teaching.subtitle: Cohorts an admin has assigned you to teach. You get read-only visibility to monitor and support learners — group management stays with facilitators, and settings with admins.
teaching.empty_body: When an admin assigns you to teach a cohort, it appears here.
